prompt: First-person perspective (POV) of a person sitting at a premium modern wooden restaurant table. In front of them is a business lunch featuring a gourmet salad, a bowl of soup, and a main course with sauce. The person is holding a sleek, bezel-less smartphone, framing the plate through the camera lens. Subtle teal and lime-green neon holographic data interfaces (graphs and abstract digital particles) float around the plate, suggesting scanning and analysis. High-end cinematic lighting with warm wood tones contrasted by cool blue and green ambient glows. Photorealistic, 8k resolution, depth of field, blurred restaurant background with futuristic vertical greenery.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, logo, QR code, signature, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy food, low quality, cartoon, illustration, readable UI text, phone screen displaying actual words
notes: Used a POV (first-person) angle to make the user feel like they are the one 'scanning' the meal, as per the post text.
Incorporated the 'business lunch' elements (soup, salad, main) specifically mentioned in the brief.
Maintained the brand color palette of teal/green neon against warm wood textures from the reference images.
Replaced readable text with 'abstract digital particles' and 'holographic interfaces' to avoid AI-generated gibberish and comply with constraints.
